component.name: ActivationCheckTask
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "run" end sub
sub run() m.top.responseJson = "" m.top.errorMessage = ""
apiBase = m.top.apiBase deviceCode = m.top.deviceCode
if apiBase = invalid or apiBase = "" or deviceCode = invalid or deviceCode = "" then m.top.errorMessage = "Missing activation settings." return end if
transfer = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") transfer.SetUrl(apiBase + "/api/activate/" + deviceCode)
response = transfer.GetToString()
if response = invalid or response = "" then m.top.errorMessage = "No response from server." return end if
m.top.responseJson = response end sub
